column7: Description
Build a production-grade REST API backend using Node.js, Express, and Supabase with Feature-Based Architecture. Covers: Auth, Products, Cart, Orders, Wishlist, Notifications, Users, Admin.

Build a production-grade frontend using Next.js 14 App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, TanStack Query, and next-intl. Covers: Auth, Products, Cart, Checkout, Orders, Wishlist, Notifications, Profile, Admin Panel, AR/EN RTL/LTR.

Create Flutter project, add dependencies: supabase_flutter, flutter_riverpod, riverpod_annotation, go_router, envied. Configure dart-define environments (.http://env.dev, .http://env.prod). Enable null safety.

Setup lib/features/{feature}/data/{datasource,models,mappers,repositories}/, logic/{contracts,entities,providers,notifiers,states}/, ui/{screens,widgets}/ per feature. lib/core/: supabase/, router/, theme/, utils/, widgets/.
Create users table: id (uuid FK auth.users), email, full_name, phone, avatar_url, role (user/admin), created_at. Enable RLS: users can read/update own row only.
Wrap app in ProviderScope. Setup AsyncNotifier base pattern. Configure go_router with GoRouter provider watching auth state. Define AppRouter in core/router/app_router.dart.
categories: id, name_en, name_ar, slug, image_url, parent_id (self-ref nullable), is_active, sort_order. RLS: public read, admin write only.
Initialize Supabase in main.dart. Create core/supabase/supabase_service.dart as singleton. Expose SupabaseClient via Riverpod provider in core/supabase/supabase_provider.dart.

products: id, category_id (FK), name_en, name_ar, description_en, description_ar, base_price, discount_price, images (text[]), is_active, is_featured, sort_order, created_at. RLS: public read, admin write.
product_variants: id, product_id (FK), sku (unique), size, color_en, color_ar, color_hex, price, discount_price, stock, is_active, sort_order. RLS: public read, admin write.

column1: Create Remaining Tables (cart_items, orders, order_items, wishlist, notifications) + RLS
column7: cart_items: id, user_id (FK), variant_id (FK product_variants), quantity, created_at. Unique constraint (user_id, variant_id). RLS: users access own rows only. orders: id, user_id, status (enum), total_amount, shipping_address (jsonb), created_at. order_items: id, order_id, variant_id, quantity, unit_price. wishlist: id, user_id, product_id, created_at. Unique (user_id, product_id). notifications: id, user_id, title, body, type, is_read, order_id (nullable), created_at. RLS: users access own rows only across all tables.
